blended.narrative: Poley Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 50°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
